title: Extract middle bits from packed uint256 using shl then shr
trigger_patterns: packed struct field access in assembly
shr shl combination for bit masking
description: To extract bits [high:low] from a uint256 without a mask: shl(256-high, value) shifts the target field to the top, then shr(256-high+low, result) shifts it down to position 0. Two shift opcodes instead of a shift + AND mask operation.
when_to_apply: Extracting a contiguous field from a packed uint256 where the field is bounded on both sides
when_not_to_apply: Extracting the lowest N bits (just use AND mask) or highest N bits (just use SHR)
